*   **[Neutrino QX and SX12](/ko-kr/products/neutrino-performance-series/?vertical=mwir&segment=oem)**: High-resolution, fast-frame MWIR models designed for intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR), counter-drone, and wide-area motion imaging (WAMI) missions.
Your Trusted Partner for ITAR-Free Infrared Camera Modules, Lenses, & AI Decision Support

items.notes: Core product line: thermal IR camera modules (Boson, Hadron, Lepton, Neutrino families) explicitly designed for ISR, uncrewed systems, gimbals, and targeting applications.

evidence.snippet: All NDAA-compliant thermal imaging models are designed and assembled in the U.S., with trusted supply chains and final testing conducted at the company’s Goleta, California facility. All modules are also non-ITAR (International Traffic in Arms Regulations) and are classified under the jurisdiction of the U.S. Department of Commerce for export.

headquarters.notes: Press release dateline and facility reference in NDAA compliance announcement article.

evidence.snippet: Your Trusted Partner for ITAR-Free Infrared Camera Modules, Lenses, & AI Decision Support

#### Thermal by FLIR is a cooperative product development and marketing program that supports original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and product innovators who use FLIR thermal imaging sensors in their products. With Thermal by FLIR, let us help you create the next market-changing innovation to grow your business.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells thermal camera modules, IR lenses, and AI software libraries to OEMs and product integrators for integration into drones and other platforms. Operates the 'Thermal by FLIR' cooperative OEM program.

evidence.snippet: Teledyne FLIR OEM Enhances Defense Readiness with NDAA-Compliant Thermal Imaging Solutions
_Full Suite of NDAA-Compliant Thermal Camera Modules Empowers OEMs to Build Secure, High-Performance Systems_

All NDAA-compliant thermal imaging models are designed and assembled in the U.S., with trusted supply chains and final testing conducted at the company’s Goleta, California facility. All modules are also non-ITAR (International Traffic in Arms Regulations) and are classified under the jurisdiction of the U.S. Department of Commerce for export.

ndaa.notes: Explicit press release announcing NDAA compliance for Neutrino, Boson, Hadron, and Lepton camera module lineup. Products designed and assembled in the U.S. at Goleta, California facility.

Would detail UAS/drone-specific products, applications, and product SKUs for uncrewed market — would sharpen ISR payload and supply-chain role confidence.

tagline: FLIR manufactures OEM thermal camera modules (uncooled LWIR: Boson/Boson+/Lepton families; cooled MWIR: Neutrino series) and dual thermal-visible payloads (Hadron 640), plus embedded AI software (Prism suite) for ISR, counter-UAS, and targeting on unmanned systems. NDAA-compliant across portfolio. Public evidence on Blue UAS certification status is absent. Dominates miniaturized thermal sensor supply chain; gaps remain in fielded program integration data and competitive cost-performance benchmarks.
